landing.heroDescription: Deploy verified white-label systems. Customize with AI safely. Launch faster than ever.
landing.systemsSubtitle: Choose a verified system and customize it with AI — no chaotic code generation.
landing.crmDesc: Complete customer relationship management with pipelines, contacts, and analytics.
landing.restaurantDesc: Orders, reservations, menu management, and delivery tracking in one platform.
landing.bookingDesc: Appointment scheduling, availability management, and automated reminders.
landing.saasDesc: Analytics dashboards, user management, and subscription billing out of the box.
landing.agencyDesc: Client portals, project management, and team collaboration tools.
landing.ecommerceDesc: Product catalog, cart, checkout, and order management with payment integration.
landing.feat1Desc: Each customer workspace is fully isolated with row-level security.
landing.feat2Desc: Add or remove system modules without breaking existing functionality.
landing.feat3Desc: Super admin can safely repair any project through controlled AI sessions.
landing.feat4Desc: Every change is logged. Every state can be restored with snapshots.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Scale when you need to.
ai.title: AI Terminal
ai.subtitle: Direct connection to Claude — build, debug, design
ai.welcomeDesc: Ask me to design systems, generate code, debug issues, or plan architecture. I have full context of the Layra platform.
ai.suggestion1: Design the CRM system template with all modules
ai.suggestion2: Generate the restaurant ordering page component
ai.suggestion3: Plan the database schema for the booking system
ai.suggestion4: Create the e-commerce product catalog module
catalog.title: System Catalog
catalog.subtitle: 35 high-demand systems ready to be built. Claude Code builds each one as a production template.
catalog.sys.crm.desc: Customer relationship management with pipelines, contacts, and analytics.
catalog.sys.project_management.desc: Kanban boards, tasks, timelines, and team collaboration.
catalog.sys.invoicing.desc: Create invoices, quotes, track expenses, and recurring billing.
catalog.sys.hr_platform.desc: Employee management, payroll, time-off, and onboarding.
catalog.sys.agency_platform.desc: Client portals, projects, proposals, and billing for agencies.
catalog.sys.restaurant.desc: Menu, orders, reservations, delivery, and kitchen display.
catalog.sys.hotel_booking.desc: Room management, reservations, check-in, and guest portal.
catalog.sys.food_delivery.desc: Multi-restaurant ordering, delivery tracking, and driver management.
catalog.sys.catering.desc: Event catering with menus, quotes, and staff scheduling.
catalog.sys.clinic_management.desc: Patient records, appointments, prescriptions, and telemedicine.
catalog.sys.gym_fitness.desc: Members, classes, trainers, subscriptions, and workout plans.
catalog.sys.salon_spa.desc: Appointment booking, services, staff management, and loyalty programs.
catalog.sys.dental_clinic.desc: Patient management, treatments, X-rays, and billing.
catalog.sys.lms.desc: Courses, students, lessons, quizzes, and certificates.
catalog.sys.school_management.desc: Students, teachers, grades, attendance, and parent portal.
catalog.sys.tutoring.desc: Tutor-student matching, sessions, scheduling, and video calls.
catalog.sys.real_estate.desc: Property listings, agents, leads, viewings, and contracts.
catalog.sys.property_management.desc: Tenants, leases, maintenance requests, and payments.
catalog.sys.booking_system.desc: Universal appointment scheduling with calendar and payments.
catalog.sys.cleaning_service.desc: Booking, staff scheduling, clients, and invoicing.
catalog.sys.legal_firm.desc: Case management, documents, billing, and time tracking.
catalog.sys.auto_repair.desc: Vehicles, work orders, parts inventory, and invoicing.
catalog.sys.freelancer_platform.desc: Projects, clients, proposals, contracts, and time tracking.
catalog.sys.ecommerce.desc: Full online store with products, cart, checkout, and shipping.
catalog.sys.pos_system.desc: Point of sale with inventory, sales tracking, and receipts.
catalog.sys.marketplace.desc: Multi-vendor marketplace with commissions and payouts.
catalog.sys.saas_dashboard.desc: Analytics, user management, subscriptions, and API keys.
catalog.sys.helpdesk.desc: Tickets, knowledge base, live chat, and SLA management.
catalog.sys.ai_automation.desc: Workflow automation with AI agents, triggers, and integrations.
catalog.sys.accounting.desc: Transactions, accounts, tax reports, and multi-currency.
catalog.sys.expense_tracker.desc: Track expenses, budgets, receipts, and approval workflows.
catalog.sys.cms.desc: Content management with pages, blog, media, and SEO tools.
catalog.sys.social_media_manager.desc: Schedule posts, track analytics, manage multiple platforms.
catalog.sys.podcast_platform.desc: Episode hosting, analytics, distribution, and monetization.
catalog.sys.event_management.desc: Events, ticketing, registrations, check-in, and sponsors.
